category_sources: source_facts.description says HTTP proxy server; official JoeDog Siege FAQ describes sproxy as a functional HTTP proxy server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official JoeDog pages use sproxy.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best available documentation surface; JoeDog download and FAQ pages provide related official context.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official JoeDog download index lists source tarballs and source repositories for other projects but no official source-control repository for sproxy.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions HTTP proxy and siege-friendly URL collection; official JoeDog Siege FAQ says sproxy collects URLs including POST and GET data in siege-friendly format.
